tool.name: aoptk summarize results
tool.description: Finalize the output of relationship identification.

configfiles.configfile:
import pandas as pd
def join_unique(series): values = series.dropna().astype(str).str.strip() return ";".join(pd.unique(values))
output = pd.read_csv("$input_file", sep="\t")
col_name = output.columns[$column_name - 1]
for effect in output["effect"].unique(): file_name = effect.strip().lower().replace(" ", "_")
output_filtered = output[output["effect"] == effect].copy()
output_filtered["relationship"] = output_filtered["relationship"].astype(str).str.strip().str.lower() relationships = sorted(output_filtered["relationship"].unique()) final_output = output_filtered[[col_name]].drop_duplicates()
for relationship in relationships: subset = output_filtered[output_filtered["relationship"] == relationship] result = subset.groupby(col_name, as_index=False, dropna=False).agg( hits=("id", "size"), ids=("id", join_unique), ) result.rename(columns={"hits": f"{relationship}", "ids": f"{relationship} IDs"}, inplace=True) final_output = final_output.merge(result, on=col_name, how="left")
final_output.to_excel(f"./{file_name}.xlsx", index=False)

param.name: input_file
param.label: TSV file.
param.help: Input tsv file with at least a heading or chemical column.

param.name: column_name
param.label: Column to group by.
param.help: Select the column from the input table to group by.

tool.help:
Summarize Results ===================
Tool to remove duplicates and summarize the output of relationship identification.
